walte28: shows [Kh Ah] (two pair, Kings and Queens)
Viinex13: shows [Kc Td] (two pair, Kings and Queens - lower kicker)
walte28 collected 4342 from pot
Viinex13 finished the tournament in 4th place
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot 4342 | Rake 0 
Board [9d 8s Qs Qc Kd]
